name: Sourdough Pancakes#6
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sourdough starter and flour with the lukewarm water until smooth.
2. Let the batter stand in a warm place overnight.
3. To the batter, add sugar, salt, and melted shortening. Beat in the eggs.
4. Dissolve baking soda in 1 tablespoon of water and gently fold it into the batter.
5. Do not stir after the baking soda has been added.
